steps.text: Read two points off the line of best fit from the scatterplot. The line passes through approximately \((24, 10)\) and \((34, 0)\). Compute slope: \(m = \frac{0-10}{34-24} = \frac{-10}{10} = -1\).
Write the line's equation using point-slope form with \((34, 0)\): \(y - 0 = -1(x - 34)\), so \(y = -x + 34\).
Substitute \(x = 25.5\): \(y = -(25.5) + 34 = 8.5\). Identify the answer choice closest to \(8.5\).

Evaluate all choices:
  • A: 6.2 — distance from 8.5 is 2.3. Not the closest. Eliminated.
  • B: 7.3 — distance from 8.5 is 1.2. Closer but not closest. Eliminated.
  • C: 8.2 — distance from 8.5 is 0.3. This is the closest value. That matches choice C — C is correct.
  • D: 9.1 — distance from 8.5 is 0.6. Farther than 8.2. Eliminated.
